name: Arcadia 2pk Acacia Wood Rocking Chair Teak - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant Outdoor Rocker
description:
Settle back in the refreshing outdoors with a rocking chair set that allows you to set up a cozy corner for well-deserved relaxation. With traditional slatting in the backrest and seat, this set is a beautiful classic upgrade for any décor. Featuring a gorgeous acacia wood frame, our set brings both incredible comfort and a homey vibe to your outdoor space. This set is finished with a gentle rocking design that creates a soothing motion for you to enjoy your deck or porch space in style.

RUSTIC STYLE: The wood design brings a truly rustic feel. This curved structure adds the perfect amount of comfort to compliment the wood frame, ensuring that each rock of these chairs is filled with leisure.

ACACIA WOOD: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands outdoor elements and will not darken over time. Acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

ROCKING FEATURE: This set features long rockers that are ideal for deep, soothing rocking motions, excellent for relaxing out in the summer sun.

TRADITIONAL SLATS: This chair set features a traditional slat motif, giving this set a wonderfully rustic feel. This classic style takes on a modern upgrade with its straight, clean lines that also complement any scheme of décor.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this set. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
